## **2.2.2.J. PI #10**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

The fields to be completed for the indicator have changed since RP3. The service provider was unable to obtain the data before June. The ratio figures have been sourced from https://www.sesperformance.eu/dataportal/vis/.

Comment to PRB: It would be preferable for these data to be pre-filled and then verified by the NSA.
